## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] i18n: New translation

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the existing conventions in the codebase
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally with `/aegis` commands
- [ ] I have NOT removed or weakened any security requirement or property
- [ ] My PR is focused on a single change (not bundling unrelated changes)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
